tasks.title: 1. Verify Vulnerability
tasks.description: Confirm the vulnerability is present. Document verification method and result.

tasks.title: 2. Identify Patch or Workaround
tasks.description: Locate the vendor patch or workaround. Check patch compatibility with the environment.

tasks.title: 3. Schedule and Apply Remediation
tasks.description: Apply patch during next available maintenance window within 72-hour SLA. Use linux-remediate.sh or docker-remediate.sh.

tasks.title: 4. Validate Fix
tasks.description: Re-scan after remediation to confirm the vulnerability is resolved.

tasks.title: 5. Close Ticket
tasks.description: Mark resolved. Update dashboard status. Document timeline.
